fields.label: Item Group
fields.description: Item Group to map to a buffer type. Items in this group will automatically get the selected buffer type when TOC is enabled, unless the item has a manual buffer type set.

fields.label: Replenishment Mode (Legacy)
fields.description: LEGACY: This DocType is no longer used for buffer routing. Routing is now derived from Item.custom_toc_auto_manufacture / custom_toc_auto_purchase flags. Manufacture = produce via Work Order. Purchase = buy from supplier. Monitor = tracked only.

fields.label: Include Sub-Groups
fields.description: If checked, this rule applies to all child item groups within this group (walks the full hierarchy). If unchecked, only items directly in this group are matched.

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Lower number = higher priority. When an item matches multiple rules (e.g. it belongs to a child group that matches two parent rules), the rule with the lowest priority number wins. Use to handle overlapping group hierarchies.
